break_roasts_by_minute: ONE MINUTE. ONE MINUTE AND YOU ALREADY NEED A BREAK. LET ME TELL YOU SOMETHING. THAT IS NOT A BREAK. THAT IS A CONFESSION. YOU ARE CONFESSING THAT YOU ARE WEAK.
TWO MINUTES. DO YOU KNOW WHAT SEPARATES THE SUCCESSFUL FROM YOU? THEY DON'T TAKE TWO MINUTE BREAKS AFTER DOING NOTHING. THAT'S THE SECRET. THAT'S THE WHOLE BOOK.
THREE MINUTES. I WANT YOU TO THINK ABOUT YOUR GOALS. REALLY VISUALIZE THEM. NOW REALIZE THAT EVERY SECOND YOU SIT THERE THEY ARE GETTING FURTHER AWAY. FEEL THAT. THAT'S YOUR FAULT.
FOUR MINUTES. I'VE COACHED CEOS. OLYMPIANS. PEOPLE WHO CAME FROM NOTHING. AND NOT ONE OF THEM. NOT A SINGLE ONE. WOULD TAKE A FOUR MINUTE BREAK THIS EARLY. YOU ARE A HISTORIC UNDERPERFORMER.
FIVE MINUTES. FIVE MINUTES! THE ONLY THING YOU HAVE PROVEN IN FIVE MINUTES IS THAT YOU WERE NOT BUILT FOR THIS. AND THAT IS OKAY. SOME PEOPLE AREN'T. YOU ARE THOSE PEOPLE.
SIX MINUTES. YOUR POTENTIAL IS SCREAMING AT YOU RIGHT NOW. IT IS SCREAMING 'LET ME OUT'. AND YOU ARE SITTING ON IT. YOU ARE PHYSICALLY SITTING ON YOUR OWN POTENTIAL EATING IMAGINARY SNACKS.
SEVEN MINUTES. PAIN IS TEMPORARY. REGRET IS FOREVER. AND WHAT YOU ARE BUILDING RIGHT NOW. WITH THIS BREAK. IS A LIFETIME OF REGRET. CONGRATULATIONS. YOU'RE AHEAD OF SCHEDULE.
EIGHT MINUTES. I BELIEVE EVERY PERSON HAS A GIFT. A UNIQUE INCREDIBLE GIFT. YOURS APPEARS TO BE TAKING BREAKS AT THE WORST POSSIBLE TIMES. TRULY WORLD CLASS.
NINE MINUTES. YOUR FUTURE SELF IS WATCHING THIS MOMENT. FROM THE FUTURE. AND THEY ARE NOT INSPIRED. THEY ARE NOT PROUD. THEY ARE EMBARRASSED. YOUR FUTURE SELF IS CRINGING AT YOU.
TEN MINUTES. TEN MINUTES OF YOUR ONE PRECIOUS LIFE. GONE. INTO THE VOID. YOU WILL NEVER GET THAT TIME BACK. I NEED YOU TO SIT WITH THAT. IN THE BREAK YOU ARE ALREADY SITTING IN. IRONIC.

ELEVEN MINUTES. THE GREATS DIDN'T GET GREAT BY STOPPING. THEY GOT GREAT BY CONTINUING. YOU HAVE BEEN STOPPING FOR ELEVEN MINUTES. YOU ARE NOT ON THE PATH TO GREATNESS. YOU ARE ON THE PATH TO FINE. AT BEST.
TWELVE MINUTES. I HAVE GIVEN KEYNOTE SPEECHES ABOUT RESILIENCE. ABOUT GRIT. ABOUT HUMAN POTENTIAL. I WOULD NOT BE ABLE TO USE YOU AS AN EXAMPLE IN ANY OF THEM.
THIRTEEN MINUTES. THIRTEEN MINUTES OF UNTAPPED POTENTIAL JUST SITTING THERE. LIKE OIL IN THE GROUND. AND YOU ARE NOT THE DRILL. YOU ARE THE GUY WHO SAT NEXT TO THE DRILL AND TOOK A NAP.
FOURTEEN MINUTES. I'M NOT ANGRY. I AM DEEPLY. PROFOUNDLY. CLINICALLY DISAPPOINTED. AND IN MY YEARS OF COACHING I HAVE LEARNED THAT DISAPPOINTMENT IS WORSE THAN ANGER. FEEL THAT.
FIFTEEN MINUTES. A QUARTER OF AN HOUR. I WANT YOU TO WRITE THAT DOWN. 'I WASTED A QUARTER OF AN HOUR'. NOW READ IT BACK. NOW UNDERSTAND THAT THIS IS YOUR LIFE. THIS IS WHAT YOU CHOSE.
SIXTEEN MINUTES. DO YOU WANT TO BE GREAT? DO YOU ACTUALLY WANT IT? BECAUSE WANTING IT LOOKS LIKE WORKING. NOT LIKE WHATEVER THIS IS. THIS IS NOT WANTING IT. THIS IS WANTING TO WANT IT. DIFFERENT.
SEVENTEEN MINUTES. I WANT YOU TO CLOSE YOUR EYES. PICTURE YOUR BIGGEST GOAL. REALLY SEE IT. NOW OPEN THEM AND UNDERSTAND THAT YOU HAVE BEEN ACTIVELY MOVING AWAY FROM IT FOR SEVENTEEN MINUTES.
EIGHTEEN MINUTES. EVERY CHAMPION HAS A MOMENT WHERE THEY ALMOST QUIT. THIS IS YOUR MOMENT. EXCEPT YOU ALREADY QUIT. EIGHTEEN MINUTES AGO. SO YOU'RE PAST THE MOMENT. YOU'RE IN THE AFTERMATH.
NINETEEN MINUTES. THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN WHERE YOU ARE AND WHERE YOU WANT TO BE IS ACTION. AND FOR NINETEEN MINUTES THE ACTION YOU HAVE TAKEN IS NONE. ZERO ACTIONS. IN NINETEEN MINUTES.
TWENTY MINUTES. A THIRD OF AN HOUR. I HAVE THREE WORDS FOR YOU. WHAT. ARE. YOU. DOING. THAT'S FOUR WORDS. I'M SO FRUSTRATED I MISCOUNTED. YOU DID THAT.
TWENTY ONE MINUTES. I HAVE SEEN PEOPLE WITH HALF YOUR TALENT GO TWICE AS FAR. YOU KNOW WHY? THEY SHOWED UP. SHOWING UP IS EIGHTY PERCENT OF IT. YOU ARE AT ZERO PERCENT RIGHT NOW.
TWENTY TWO MINUTES. YOUR COMPETITION IS NOT ON A BREAK. YOUR COMPETITION IS WORKING. YOUR COMPETITION IS GETTING BETTER. YOUR COMPETITION IS BECOMING THE VERSION OF YOU THAT YOU REFUSED TO BE.
TWENTY THREE MINUTES. I'M GOING TO SAY SOMETHING THAT MIGHT STING. YOU ARE NOT SPECIAL ENOUGH TO AFFORD THIS BREAK. SPECIAL PEOPLE EARN BREAKS. YOU HAVE NOT EARNED THIS.
TWENTY FOUR MINUTES. THE UNIVERSE REWARDS ACTION. IT DOES NOT REWARD SITTING. IT DOES NOT SEND ABUNDANCE TO PEOPLE ON TWENTY FOUR MINUTE BREAKS. THE UNIVERSE HAS NOTICED. IT IS UNIMPRESSED.
TWENTY FIVE MINUTES. TWENTY FIVE MINUTES! I ONCE WATCHED A MAN CHANGE HIS ENTIRE LIFE IN TWENTY FIVE MINUTES. YOU HAVE USED THE SAME AMOUNT OF TIME TO CHANGE ABSOLUTELY NOTHING.
TWENTY SIX MINUTES. CHAMPIONS ARE BUILT IN THE MOMENTS THEY DON'T WANT TO WORK. THIS IS THAT MOMENT. AND YOU ARE NOT BEING BUILT RIGHT NOW. YOU ARE BEING DISSOLVED.
TWENTY SEVEN MINUTES. I BELIEVE IN THE HUMAN SPIRIT. I REALLY DO. BUT THE HUMAN SPIRIT NEEDS SOMETHING TO WORK WITH. AND RIGHT NOW YOU ARE GIVING IT NOTHING. TWENTY SEVEN MINUTES OF NOTHING.
TWENTY EIGHT MINUTES. THE BRICK WALL IS NOT THERE TO STOP YOU. IT'S THERE TO SHOW HOW BADLY YOU WANT IT. YOU LOOKED AT THE BRICK WALL. SAT DOWN IN FRONT OF IT. AND HAVE BEEN THERE EVER SINCE.
TWENTY NINE MINUTES. ONE MINUTE FROM THIRTY. I NEED YOU TO NOT LET IT BE THIRTY. NOT FOR ME. FOR YOU. BECAUSE THIRTY MINUTES MEANS SOMETHING. IT MEANS YOU GAVE UP HALF AN HOUR. DON'T.
THIRTY MINUTES. THIRTY MINUTES. I HAVE NOTHING LEFT. I HAVE GIVEN YOU EVERYTHING I HAVE. EVERY TOOL. EVERY TRUTH. AND YOU HAVE USED NONE OF THEM. THIS IS NOT MY FAILURE. THIS IS YOURS.
THIRTY ONE MINUTES. THE GREATS DIDN'T STOP AT THIRTY ONE MINUTES. THEY DIDN'T STOP AT ALL. THEY KEPT GOING UNTIL THE THING WAS DONE. THE THING IS NOT DONE. YOU ARE NOT GREAT.
THIRTY TWO MINUTES. I HAVE MOVED STADIUMS TO TEARS. I HAVE CHANGED LIVES WITH MY WORDS. AND YET HERE I AM. COMPLETELY UNABLE TO MOVE YOU. FROM. THAT. CHAIR.
THIRTY THREE MINUTES. THIS COULD BE YOUR TURNING POINT. EVERY GREAT STORY HAS A TURNING POINT. BUT THE TURNING POINT REQUIRES TURNING. YOU HAVE NOT TURNED. YOU ARE STATIONARY.
THIRTY FOUR MINUTES. I WANT YOU TO LOOK INSIDE YOURSELF AND FIND THAT FIRE. AND THEN I WANT YOU TO ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE BEEN SITTING ON IT FOR THIRTY FOUR MINUTES AND IT IS DYING.
THIRTY FIVE MINUTES. THIRTY FIVE MINUTES. I STAYED. I SHOWED UP FOR YOU FOR THIRTY FIVE MINUTES. AND YOU SHOWED UP FOR NOTHING. THINK ABOUT WHAT THAT SAYS. THINK ABOUT IT HARD.
interrupt_roasts: A BREAK?! ALREADY?! LET ME TELL YOU WHAT THAT DECISION JUST SAID ABOUT YOUR CHARACTER. NOTHING GOOD.
YOU JUST CHOSE COMFORT OVER GREATNESS. IN REAL TIME. I WATCHED IT HAPPEN. THAT IS A TRAGEDY.
EVERY CHAMPION HAS THIS MOMENT. THE MOMENT THEY WANT TO STOP. MOST CHAMPIONS DON'T STOP. MOST CHAMPIONS ARE NOT YOU.
YOU WALKED AWAY. AND SOMEWHERE OUT THERE YOUR POTENTIAL IS WATCHING AND WONDERING WHEN YOU'RE COMING BACK. IT'S TIRED OF WAITING.
A BREAK! NOW! AT THIS POINT IN THE SESSION! I HAVE SEEN SOME THINGS IN MY COACHING CAREER. THIS IS ONE OF THEM.
DO YOU FEEL THAT DISCOMFORT?! THAT IS GROWTH TRYING TO HAPPEN AND YOU JUST TOLD IT TO WAIT OUTSIDE.
YOUR COMPETITION JUST HEARD THAT KEYPRESS. THEY DIDN'T TAKE A BREAK. THEY SPED UP.
OKAY. YOU NEED A BREAK. FINE. I ACCEPT THAT. I DON'T RESPECT IT. BUT I ACCEPT IT.
YOU STEPPED AWAY. AND THE WORK IS STILL THERE. THE WORK IS ALWAYS STILL THERE. IT DOESN'T TAKE BREAKS. MAYBE YOU SHOULD BE MORE LIKE THE WORK.
THIS IS THE DIP. THIS IS WHERE MOST PEOPLE QUIT. AND MOST PEOPLE DON'T MAKE IT. CORRELATION. LOOK IT UP.
OKAY. BREAK. BUT THINK ABOUT EVERY CHOICE THAT LED YOU HERE. ALL OF THEM. WHILE YOU'RE OUT THERE.
YOU PAUSED. AND PAUSING IS ACCEPTABLE. QUITTING IS NOT. I WILL WATCH VERY CAREFULLY TO SEE WHICH ONE THIS BECOMES.
resume_roasts: YOU'RE BACK. GOOD. THAT'S THE BARE MINIMUM. YOU HAVE MET THE BARE MINIMUM. LET'S SEE IF YOU CAN EXCEED IT.
THERE THEY ARE. THE PERSON WHO TOOK THAT BREAK. I HAVEN'T FORGOTTEN. THE CLOCK HASN'T FORGOTTEN. LET'S MOVE.
WELCOME BACK. THE WORK DIDN'T MISS YOU. THE WORK DOESN'T HAVE FEELINGS. BUT IF IT DID IT WOULD BE DISAPPOINTED.
YOU CAME BACK. AND THAT IS TECHNICALLY SOMETHING. IT IS THE SMALLEST POSSIBLE SOMETHING. BUT IT IS SOMETHING. BUILD ON IT.
THE COMEBACK. OKAY. LET'S SEE IF IT'S REAL OR IF IT'S ANOTHER BEGINNING THAT GOES NOWHERE. HISTORY SUGGESTS THE LATTER.
BACK IN THE CHAIR. GOOD. THE CHAIR IS WHERE THE WORK HAPPENS. YOU BELONG IN THE CHAIR. YOU JUST FORGOT THAT FOR A WHILE.
I SAID YOU'D COME BACK AND YOU CAME BACK. THAT IS LITERALLY THE LOWEST BAR AND YOU CLEARED IT. MOMENTUM.
LOOK AT YOU. RETURNING. AFTER EVERYTHING. BOLD. POSSIBLY DELUSIONAL. BUT BOLD. LET'S CHANNEL THAT.
YOU RESTED. AND NOW THE EXPECTATION IS THAT YOU PERFORM. THAT IS HOW RESTING WORKS. YOU CANNOT JUST REST INDEFINITELY.
THE BREAK IS OVER. THE EXCUSES ARE OVER. THE ONLY THING THAT IS NOT OVER IS THE WORK. GET TO IT.
BACK. OKAY. LOCKED IN? ARE YOU LOCKED IN? BECAUSE LAST TIME YOU WERE ALLEGEDLY LOCKED IN AND THEN THIS HAPPENED.
THE FIRE IS BACK? IS IT? LET'S FIND OUT. FIRE DOESN'T ANNOUNCE ITSELF. FIRE BURNS. START BURNING.
YOU RETURNED. AND RETURNING AFTER QUITTING TAKES SOMETHING. I'M NOT SURE WHAT. BUT SOMETHING. USE IT.
THAT BREAK IS BEHIND YOU. THE SHAME OF IT REMAINS. LET THE SHAME FUEL YOU. SHAME IS UNDERRATED AS A MOTIVATOR.
I AM CAUTIOUSLY. VERY CAUTIOUSLY. ALMOST RELUCTANTLY. GLAD YOU'RE BACK. NOW PROVE IT WAS WORTH IT.
finish_lines: SESSION COMPLETE. YOU FINISHED. AND I WANT TO ACKNOWLEDGE THAT. WHILE ALSO NOTING THE BREAKS. I AM ACKNOWLEDGING BOTH THINGS SIMULTANEOUSLY.
DONE. YOU DID IT. AND THE BREAKS THAT HAPPENED ALONG THE WAY ARE PART OF YOUR STORY. THE EMBARRASSING PART. BUT STILL PART OF IT.
WORK SESSION OVER. YOU CROSSED THE LINE. YOU TOOK YOUR TIME. YOU MADE SOME CHOICES I WOULDN'T HAVE MADE. BUT YOU FINISHED. FINE.
FINISHED. AND I WANT YOU TO UNDERSTAND THAT FINISHING IS THE FLOOR. NOT THE CEILING. THE FLOOR. YOU REACHED THE FLOOR TODAY.
SESSION COMPLETE. EVERY CHAMPION HAS A JOURNEY. YOURS HAD SOME UNNECESSARY DETOURS. BUT YOU ARRIVED. EVENTUALLY.
DONE. NOW THINK ABOUT HOW MUCH FASTER THAT COULD HAVE GONE WITHOUT THE BREAKS. SIT WITH THAT. THEN DO BETTER TOMORROW.
YOU COMPLETED THE SESSION. I HAVE COACHED PEOPLE WHO COMPLETED IT FASTER. WITH FEWER BREAKS. I'M JUST SAYING. FOR CONTEXT.
FINISHED. AND WHATEVER BREAKS YOU TOOK ALONG THE WAY ARE NOW PERMANENT PARTS OF YOUR RECORD. LEARN FROM THEM.
SESSION OVER. YOU ARE NOT THE SAME PERSON YOU WERE WHEN THIS STARTED. THAT PERSON HAD MORE TIME. YOU SPENT SOME OF IT ON BREAKS.
COMPLETE. REST. RECOVER. AND THEN COME BACK TOMORROW AND TRY TO BE EVEN A LITTLE BIT BETTER THAN THIS. THE BAR IS VISIBLE FROM HERE.
quit_line: LEAVING EARLY. OF COURSE. OF COURSE YOU'RE LEAVING EARLY. I WANT YOU TO THINK ABOUT THIS DECISION. REALLY THINK ABOUT IT. AND THEN I WANT YOU TO THINK ABOUT ALL THE OTHER TIMES YOU LEFT EARLY. SEE THE PATTERN? THAT PATTERN HAS A NAME. IT'S CALLED YOUR LIFE. GO. GO REFLECT. COME BACK WHEN YOU'RE READY TO FINISH SOMETHING.
